title: agrostis infirma var. arisan-montana
intro: Agrostis infirma var. arisan-montana is a variety of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of bentgrass. It is reported to have medicinal properties, with the plant's extracts exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Agrostis infirma var. arisan-montana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions and decoctions, which are believed to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
